name: test_spearman
desc: ancient tribal spearman warrior, bronze-tipped spear and round wooden shield, leather and fur armor, war paint

name: test_swordsman
desc: ancient tribal swordsman, short iron sword and tall oval shield, scale armor over tunic, crested helmet

name: test_cavalry
desc: ancient tribal cavalry rider mounted on a sturdy warhorse, lance and small shield, cloak flowing, bronze helmet

name: test_archer
desc: ancient tribal archer, recurve bow drawn, leather quiver, hooded cloak, light tunic and arm guards

name: test_siege
desc: ancient siege engineer crew with a wooden ballista war machine, ropes and iron fittings, two crew members
